features.title: Why Choose Reno Stars
features.subtitle: Partnering with us means more than just completing a renovation, it's about making the entire process clear, controlled, and stress-free.

experience.title: 20+ Years Industry Experience
experience.description: We bring deep expertise. Not just in construction but in understanding where renovation projects go wrong, and how to prevent it from the start.

coverage.title: $5M CGL Insurance · Active WCB Coverage
coverage.description: Comprehensive insurance coverage protects your property and ensures every worker on-site is fully covered.

rating.title: Authentic 5-Star Reviews
rating.description: Long-term client satisfaction backed by real projects and real experiences, not one-off promotions.

team.title: Stable, Professional Team
team.description: We work with a consistent crew. Not temporary hires, ensuring quality stays stable across every project.

service.title: End-to-End Service
service.description: From design to final walkthrough, we manage every step. Less coordination overhead, smoother process.

transparent.problem: Many quotes look cheap because key items are left out.
transparent.solution: We list everything upfront, detailed scope, material responsibilities, and what is included. You know the real cost before you start.

managed.problem: Renovation shouldn't rely on improvisation and luck.
managed.solution: We run projects through a structured system with clear stages, inspections, and payment milestones. Every step completed before moving forward.

responsive.problem: Most renovation frustrations come from poor communication.
responsive.solution: We have a dedicated office team that responds quickly, helps with material selection, and keeps you updated, no 'sent a message, got no reply' moments.

scheduled.problem: Some contractors overbook and your timeline keeps slipping.
scheduled.solution: We control our project load to ensure yours moves forward as planned. When delays happen (suppliers, etc.), we communicate early and adjust transparently.

consistent.problem: Quality shouldn't depend on which crew shows up.
consistent.solution: We use a fixed team with clear standards, especially for critical work like waterproofing, where materials and application scope are specified upfront.

experience.problem: Renovation is stressful when you're constantly chasing updates.
experience.solution: We make the whole process predictable: you know what's happening now, what's next, and when to expect it, without needing to follow up.

cta.heading: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subtitle: Experience the difference of a renovation process built around transparency, clear communication, and your peace of mind.
